title: Inviting Polish Brie Omelette
description: A sour, springy, kid-friendly Polish omelette featuring brie, whisked eggs, and low-glycemic ingredients.
instructions: Whisk together eggs, low-fat brie, whole wheat flour, almond milk, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Heat olive oil in a nonstick skillet over medium heat and sauté the diced onion until translucent.
Add the spinach to the skillet and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Pour the whisked egg mixture into the skillet, spreading evenly over the vegetables.
Cook the omelette without stirring until the edges begin to set, about 3 minutes.
Flip the omelette carefully using a spatula and cook the second side until golden brown and firm, about 2 minutes.
Slide the omelette onto a plate and cut into wedges for serving.
